description_long: This is a plush toy shaped like a round, bright green creature with a single small tail-like protrusion on top of its head. The toy features a wide, open red mouth with a pink tongue and several white teeth, giving it a playful and expressive appearance. It wears oversized white 3D glasses with one red and one blue lens, adding a whimsical and cartoonish touch. The eyes are visible through the glasses, and the toy has small, rounded feet at the base. The surface is made of soft, fuzzy fabric, and the toy appears to be filled with a lightweight stuffing. The overall design is cheerful and eye-catching, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A bright green plush toy with a wide red mouth, white teeth, and oversized 3D glasses with red and blue lenses. The toy is round, soft, and features playful cartoon-like details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green plush body, protruding tail, and the open red mouth with visible white teeth and tongue, as well as the 3D glasses from an angle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large open mouth, white teeth, pink tongue, and the full face with 3D glasses clearly visible over the eyes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the plush body, tail, and the 3D glasses with the blue lens more prominent, along with the open mouth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the green plush toy, the tail, and the back of the 3D glasses, with no facial features visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and happy, with a wide open mouth, visible tongue, and white teeth, giving the impression of excitement or joy.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its mouth open wide and feet positioned at the base, the head slightly tilted upward.
